title: Amazon Neptune Analytics Graph
description: Represents a Neptune Analytics graph resource, which is a memory-optimized graph database instance for analytical workloads with support for openCypher queries, vector search, and optimized graph algorithms.

id.description: The unique identifier of the graph, assigned by Neptune Analytics.

graphName.description: The name of the graph (used in creation requests).

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the graph.

status.description: The current status of the graph resource.

statusReason.description: The reason for the current status, if applicable.

createTime.description: The time the graph was created.

provisionedMemory.description: The provisioned memory size in Neptune Capacity Units (NCUs). Each NCU provides approximately 2 GiB of memory.

endpoint.description: The DNS endpoint for connecting to the graph.

publicConnectivity.description: Whether the graph can be accessed over the public internet.

dimension.description: The number of dimensions for vector embeddings.

replicaCount.description: The number of read replicas for the graph.

kmsKeyIdentifier.description: The KMS key identifier used for encryption at rest.

sourceSnapshotId.description: The ID of the source snapshot if the graph was restored from a snapshot.

deletionProtection.description: Whether deletion protection is enabled for the graph.

buildNumber.description: The build number of the Neptune Analytics engine.

tags.description: Tags assigned to the graph as key-value pairs.
